steps.title: Find the antecedent
steps.content: The blank begins a sentence referring back to 'Multitask learning,' a singular noun phrase. The pronoun must agree in number and clearly serve as the subject of 'involves training computer models.'

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: A and B are plural, so they do not agree with the singular antecedent. D is indefinite and leaves unclear what performs the action. A singular pronoun cleanly refers back to the one approach just named. The answer is C.
